files_replaced: src/spy_der/contracts/models.py Candidate/CandidateUniverse stubs replaced by contracts/candidates.py
files_deferred: Executable economics / fill models / fees / slippage -> Phase 8 economics/service.py
EV, touch probability, wall/gamma safety scoring from spread_selector._evaluate -> Phase 8 ranking
System A naked/cash-secured optional families -> permanently rejected by System B registry
Candidate value models / pairwise ranker / shadow ranking -> Phase 8+
Legacy permission filtering inside factory -> caller supplies allowed families; Legacy layer remains separate
behavior_preserved: Credit vertical / debit vertical / condor / fly / broken-wing / long / strangle / backspread geometries from System A enumerators.
Stable IDs are content-addressed and independent of policy/model/EV.
Undefined or unbounded maximum loss is rejected (fail-closed).
intentional_changes: Family names normalized to master-spec identifiers (aliases retained for System A names).
Maximum-loss proof uses piecewise-linear breakpoints + tail slope (not sampled grids).
Deterministic dominance prune added (no System A equivalent module).
Candidate.max_loss property aliases maximum_loss for synthesis/risk compatibility.
known_gaps: Factory does not yet apply Legacy hard-veto family filters automatically.
Quote refs are contract IDs only; fill-quality economics remain Phase 8.
Broken-wing / backspread generation is bounded but not exhaustively strike-optimized.
rollback: Revert the Phase 7 commit(s). Phases 0-6 are unaffected.
No new third-party dependencies were added in Phase 7.
next_phase: Phase 8 — Economics and candidate value (spec §63): fill models, fees, slippage, executable economics, candidate-value models, ranking, regret, meta-action.
